name: Potato Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the mashed potatoes, egg white, chopped onion, all-purpose flour, and salt.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. When the oil is hot, scoop about 2 tablespoons of potato mixture for each cake and place it into the skillet.
4. Cook until well browned on one side, then use a spatula to flip and cook the other side until browned.
5. Continue making cakes, keeping the first ones warm.
